name: Granny Fearing's Kentucky Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/8 cup Heinz sweet gherkin pickle juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Combine pork and beans, onion, ketchup, mustard, brown sugar, molasses, gherkin juice, vinegar, salt, and pepper to taste in a 2-quart casserole.
3. Top with strips of bacon in a crisscross pattern.
4. Cover with aluminum foil.
5. Bake in preheated 350 degree oven for 1 1/2 hours.
6. Remove foil for the last 30 minutes of baking.
7. Serve hot or cold.
8. Beans may be prepared up to one day ahead and refrigerated. Warm in a 350 degree oven for no more than 20 minutes.
